name: Sketch3DPrimitivesGallery
_comment: Gallery of the W53 sketch_3d_sketch primitive: a non-planar 3D polyline (4 points spanning all three axes). Prerequisite for weldments (FR-5-06) and swept/lofted surfaces (FR-5-02).

features.name: SK3D_NonPlanarPath
features._comment: Non-planar 3D polyline: (0,0,0) -> (100,0,0) -> (100,50,30) -> (0,50,60). Z extent = 60 mm, spanning all three axes.
